title: bulga scoparia
intro: Bulga scoparia, also known as Wu Wei Zi, is a plant species native to China, which belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bulga scoparia include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and bronchitis, and improving immune function, making it a popular remedy for respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Bulga scoparia is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
